description_long: This is a single right-hand glove designed for urban use, featuring a combination of light beige and dark gray materials. The glove has reinforced padding on the knuckles, fingers, and palm, providing extra protection and grip for activities such as cycling, construction, or general outdoor work. The back of the glove displays a textured, ribbed pattern with a visible brand marking and a small fabric tag on the side. The palm side is constructed with darker, more rugged material and additional stitched reinforcements for durability and abrasion resistance. The glove appears to have a slip-on design with a short cuff and a small pull tab for easy donning. The overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic fabric, rubberized padding, and possibly some leather or suede elements for enhanced grip and comfort.
description: A rugged, light beige and dark gray right-hand glove with reinforced knuckles, padded palm, and a slip-on design. It features textured surfaces, visible branding, and is built for urban outdoor activities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed, textured back, reinforced knuckles, and visible brand marking.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glove's thickness, layered construction, and the small fabric tag.
description_view_2: Palm view displaying the dark, padded grip areas and reinforced stitching for durability.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thumb's reinforced area and the glove's ergonomic curvature.
attribute_logo: Embossed 'MECHANIX' text on the back of the hand and a small fabric tag on the side
